checks.rule: UF-01: Caption includes court name
UF-02: Caption includes case number
UF-03: Caption includes party names
UF-04: Document title present
UF-05: Signature block includes name
UF-06: Signature block includes address
UF-07: Signature block includes phone
UF-08: Date present in signature block or filing
checks.detail: FIX: Add date in signature block (e.g., 'Dated: Month DD, YYYY')

checks.rule: UF-09: Certificate of service present
UF-10: Certificate of service includes date served
checks.detail: FIX: Certificate of service must state date of service

checks.rule: UF-11: Certificate of service includes method of service
checks.detail: FIX: State method of service (e.g., 'first-class mail', 'MiFILE e-service', 'hand delivery')

checks.rule: UF-12: Certificate of service lists opposing party
UF-13: No placeholder text remaining
UF-14: Pages appear consecutively numbered
UF-15: Pro se status identified
UF-16: Electronic signature format (/s/ Name) present
checks.detail: FIX: For e-filing, use '/s/ Andrew James Pigors' as electronic signature

checks.rule: UF-17: Child referred to by initials only (MCR 8.119(H))
AH-01: No fabricated 'Jane Berry' (hallucination)
AH-02: No fabricated 'Patricia Berry' (hallucination)
AH-03: No wrong judge name 'Amy McNeill'
AH-04: Ronald Berry not listed as attorney (he is not one)
AH-05: Correct defendant name (Emily A. Watson, not Ann/M.)
AH-06: No fabricated '91% alienation score'
AH-07: No fabricated '9 CPS investigations'
AH-08: No wrong name 'Tiffany' for defendant
CR-01: Case number present
CR-02: Document appears legible (no binary garbage)
CR-03: All files have substantive content
CR-04: No bundled unrelated documents
checks.detail: WARN: Verify each file contains only ONE document type when converting to PDF

checks.rule: CR-05: Required signature(s) present
F10-01: 'EMERGENCY' label prominent on first page
F10-02: References MCR 7.211(C)(6) for immediate consideration
checks.detail: FIX: Cite MCR 7.211(C)(6) — standard for emergency/immediate consideration

checks.rule: F10-03: Peremptory reversal: MCR 7.211(C)(4) + 'manifest error'
checks.detail: FIX: For peremptory reversal, cite MCR 7.211(C)(4) and demonstrate 'manifest error' standard

checks.rule: F10-04: Brief portion within limits (max 50 pages / 14,000 words)
F10-05: $375 filing fee referenced OR IFP application attached
F10-06: Filed within 21 days of final order (or delay explained)
F10-07: Served on ALL parties (Watson, FOC, lower court)
F10-08: Caption includes COA Case No. 366810
EF-01: Each document is a separate file (not bundled)
EF-02: Electronic signature format: /s/ Andrew James Pigors
checks.detail: FIX: Add '/s/ Andrew James Pigors' as electronic signature for e-filing

checks.rule: EF-03: PDF format noted (recommended for MiFILE)
checks.detail: WARN: Ensure documents are converted to PDF before uploading to MiFILE

checks.rule: EF-04: Descriptive file names with case number
checks.detail: WARN: Consider adding case number to file names for MiFILE

checks.rule: EF-05: File size under 25 MB each
checks.detail: WARN: Verify each PDF is under 25 MB (conservative: under 10 MB) before e-filing

checks.rule: EF-06: Scanned documents at 300 dpi B&W/grayscale
checks.detail: WARN: If any scanned exhibits, ensure 300 dpi B&W or grayscale for legibility

checks.rule: EF-07: No password-protected or restricted PDFs
checks.detail: WARN: Ensure no PDFs are password-protected before uploading to MiFILE
